<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>流<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Liú</rt></ruby><ruby>便<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">biàn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>缅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miǎn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Lì</rt></ruby><ruby>未<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby>、<ruby>犹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yóu</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby>、

<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>萨<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sà</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">迦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiā</rt></ruby>、<ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>布<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lún</rt></ruby>、<ruby>便<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>悯<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǐn</rt></ruby>、

<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dàn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Ná</rt></ruby><ruby>弗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby>、<ruby class="CharOverride-1">迦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dé</rt></ruby>、<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>设<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shè</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>共<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>七<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>；<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>瑟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>经<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jinɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>埃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Āi</rt></ruby><ruby>及<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>瑟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>代<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>养<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>且<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiě</rt></ruby><ruby>繁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>茂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mào</rt></ruby>，<ruby>极<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>其<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qí</rt></ruby><ruby>强<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>盛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>满<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>认<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rèn</rt></ruby><ruby>识<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shi</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>瑟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>新<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>治<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhì</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>埃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Āi</rt></ruby><ruby>及<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>百<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>姓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǎ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>民<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mín</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>还<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>强<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>盛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Lái</rt></ruby><ruby>吧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bɑ</rt></ruby>！<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>巧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>计<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>恐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>怕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pà</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>遇<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">me</rt></ruby><ruby>争<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>战<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>连<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lián</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dí</rt></ruby><ruby>攻<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>击<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>离<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lí</rt></ruby><ruby>开<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kāi</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qù</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>埃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Āi</rt></ruby><ruby>及<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>派<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pài</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>辖<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiá</rt></ruby><ruby>制<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>加<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>重<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>担<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>苦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>害<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>。<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>老<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>建<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>两<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>座<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>积<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>货<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huò</rt></ruby><ruby>城<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chénɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>东<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>兰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Lán</rt></ruby><ruby>塞<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sài</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>越<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuè</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>苦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>害<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>越<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuè</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>越<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuè</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>蔓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">màn</rt></ruby><ruby>延<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yán</rt></ruby>，<ruby>埃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Āi</rt></ruby><ruby>及<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>愁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chóu</rt></ruby><ruby>烦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>埃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Āi</rt></ruby><ruby>及<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>严<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yán</rt></ruby><ruby>严<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yán</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>苦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>觉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jué</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>苦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǔ</rt></ruby>；<ruby>无<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wú</rt></ruby><ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lùn</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huó</rt></ruby><ruby>泥<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ní</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>砖<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhuān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>田<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tián</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiè</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>严<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yán</rt></ruby><ruby>严<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yán</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>晓<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">谕<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Mó</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xī</rt></ruby>、<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lún</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：

<ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Mó</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xī</rt></ruby>、<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lún</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qu</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>老<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǎo</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>照<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhào</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>吩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>咐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lún</rt></ruby><ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>杖<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>丢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">diū</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>老<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>臣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chén</rt></ruby><ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qián</rt></ruby>，<ruby>杖<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>变<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>蛇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shé</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>丢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">diū</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>杖<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>杖<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>变<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>蛇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shé</rt></ruby>，<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lún</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>杖<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>吞<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tūn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>杖<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhànɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>吩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>咐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Mó</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xī</rt></ruby>、<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lún</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>取<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>几<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>捧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pěnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>炉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lú</rt></ruby><ruby>灰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Mó</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xī</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>老<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>扬<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>礼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huá</rt></ruby>。<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>乐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lè</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>礼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>金<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jīn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>银<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yín</rt></ruby>、<ruby>铜<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tónɡ</rt></ruby>，
